ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the country belongs to */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator (e.g., Consumer Index) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of what the indicator measures */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the indicator belongs to */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator (e.g., percent, dollars) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data the indicator represents (e.g., time series, ratio) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry of economic data */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data pertains to */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator the data represents */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the data corresponds to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator in that year */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source providing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year (e.g., 2005, 2006) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., economist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report (analysis, graphs, etc.) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., pdf, excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., inflation, employment) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_values" (
  "indicator_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator value record */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the value corresponds to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator for that year */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source providing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_values_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_values_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the indicator */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_access_logs_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "source_data_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the link */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source providing the indicator data */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator linked to the source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the link was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_source_data_links_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_source_data_links_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecast_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast model */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator the model is for */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecast model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forecast model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecast_models_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comparative_analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparative analysis */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator the analysis is for */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the analysis is for */,
  "analysis_name" TEXT /* Name of the comparative analysis */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the comparative analysis */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparative_analyses_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comparative_analyses_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)
